description: In an IPL 2026 match, Suyash Sharma dismissed Shubman Gill (32) and mocked him by copying his ‘bow down’ celebration, thrilling the Chinnaswamy crowd. Sai Sudharsan smashed a century, helping Gujarat Titans post 205 after a strong opening stand. However, Virat Kohli (81) and Devdutt Padikkal (55) stitched a quick partnership, guiding Royal Challengers Bengaluru to a five-wicket win in 18.5 overs.

A crowdfunding effort is underway to support her extensive medical bills and her dream of a better future.

The real wall with ears: Ancient Roman walls can hear you from metres away
description: Ancient Roman structures, utilizing smooth stone and carefully shaped interiors, exhibit remarkable acoustic properties. Curved walls and vast domes guide sound, creating whispering gallery effects where even quiet voices travel with surprising clarity. This architectural design allowed performers in Roman theaters to be heard by large audiences without amplification.

title: Men in BMW, Fortuner refuse to pay toll fee, assault and abduct staffer in north Bengaluru
description: Three men in a BMW and Toyota Fortuner allegedly assaulted and briefly abducted a toll plaza employee near Bengaluru after refusing to pay the fee. Claiming to be associates of a local MLA, they forced their way through the barrier, punching and kicking one employee and bundling another into their vehicle.

description: Zen Sadavarte, daughter of a former Bigg Boss contestant, has filed a complaint seeking an FIR against a woman who confronted Maharashtra minister Girish Mahajan during a rally. The woman had protested a traffic jam caused by the event, alleging inconvenience. Zen's complaint cites obstruction of duty and inciting panic.

description: Cristiano Ronaldo’s former chef has revealed that the forward has completely avoided milk as part of his diet, despite its widespread use in sports nutrition. The insight offers a rare look into the specific choices behind his routine, highlighting a preference for natural foods and strict control over intake, which has supported his longevity at the highest level.‘It’s against nature’: Cristiano Ronaldo’s former chef reveals why he avoids and never drinks milk, shares daily diet details

title: KPMG to lay off 10% of US audit team after failed retirement efforts
description: KPMG is set to cut approximately 10% of its US audit partners after voluntary retirement schemes failed to yield desired results. The accounting giant, one of the Big Four, cited a need to align its partnership size with current business demands.

title: Patrick Mahomes $325 million valuation shock: Off-field move amid recovery
description: Patrick Mahomes, the Kansas City Chiefs’ quarterback, is focused on his recovery from his brutal injuries as his wife, Brittany Mahomes stands by his side through all the difficult times. While both Patrick Mahomes and his wife, Brittany Mahomes, have preferred to be private about the star player’s recovery, the high profile couple recently received an update worth a whopping $325 million.

title: Dianna Russini claim shocks: Alleged confession rocks Mike Vrabel saga
description: Mike Vrabel, the New England Patriots’ head coach, has publicly announced that he is taking some time off to seek counselling as the alleged affair rumors with Dianna Russini refuse to die down as new details emerge. Amid all the mess, it seems the situation has taken a turn for the worse as Dianna Russini’s husband and child have been dragged into the drama.
